text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-1st:ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn is the 10th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack. 

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics: Rie
Vocals: Eliana

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn.

All occurrences

Episode 50 - Reiner and the Beast Titan reveal themselves
Episode 52 - The Colossal Titan starts to wreak havoc
The previews of episodes 50 - 58 are accompanied by Eliana's melisma (1:21-1:35).
